steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The passage describes an experiment designed to test the hypothesis that Clovis points caused mammoth extinction. The critical signal is the contrast in results: the spears penetrated clay minimally, contradicting the idea they could kill large animals.

The experiment’s outcome directly casts doubt on the established hypothesis, making this the main structural shift in the text.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D captures the purpose of describing an experiment that challenges a prior belief. A misrepresents the content (no new debate is mentioned), B discusses a nonexistent method critique, and C invents a second hypothesis not present in the passage. That matches choice D — D is correct.
